SFT Dataset
Supervised Fine-Tuning Data
Culturally-adapted prompt-response pairs across 8 languages. Human-written and task-categorized for LLM fine-tuning pipelines.
Prompt

أنتِ مديرة موارد بشرية في مجموعة تجزئة كبرى بالقاهرة. اكتبي مذكرة داخلية رسمية موجَّهة إلى مدراء الأقسام تُعلمينهم فيها بقرار تجميد الترقيات لمدة ستة أشهر بسبب إعادة هيكلة الميزانية، مع الحرص على صون الروح المعنوية.

Response

الزملاء والزميلات الكرام، بناءً على توجيهات الإدارة العليا وعقب مداولات معمَّقة، تقرَّر تجميد حركة الترقيات في كافة الأقسام خلال الفترة المقبلة. نؤكد أن كل جهد يُبذل اليوم سيظل موثقًا ومقيَّمًا بعناية كاملة...

Category: Text GenerationFormat: JSONLDialect: Egyptian ArabicHuman-written
Prompt

You are a senior product manager at a B2B SaaS company. Write a prioritization framework memo for your engineering team explaining why you are deprioritizing three requested features this quarter, while maintaining team morale and transparency.

Response

Team, I want to be upfront about the difficult prioritization decisions we're making this quarter. After extensive analysis of our roadmap, customer impact scores, and engineering capacity, I've made the call to defer three commonly-requested features...

Category: Professional WritingFormat: JSONLDialect: American EnglishHuman-written
Prompt

Vous êtes consultant en stratégie pour une PME parisienne dans le secteur de la restauration. Rédigez un plan d'action en trois étapes pour améliorer la fidélisation client, sans augmenter le budget marketing.

Response

Pour améliorer la fidélisation sans investissement publicitaire supplémentaire, je propose trois axes stratégiques fondés sur l'expérience client directe. La première étape consiste à mettre en place un système de reconnaissance personnalisée...

Category: StrategyFormat: JSONLDialect: Metropolitan FrenchHuman-written
Prompt

Sie sind Marketingleiter eines mittelständischen deutschen Unternehmens. Schreiben Sie eine interne E-Mail an Ihr Team, in der Sie die neue Content-Strategie für das nächste Quartal vorstellen und die Prioritäten klar definieren.

Response

Liebes Team, im Hinblick auf das kommende Quartal möchte ich euch heute über unsere aktualisierte Content-Strategie informieren. Nach eingehender Analyse unserer bisherigen Maßnahmen und der aktuellen Marktlage haben wir drei klare Prioritäten definiert...

Category: Business WritingFormat: JSONLDialect: Standard GermanHuman-written
Prompt

Sei un consulente finanziario a Milano. Scrivi una lettera professionale a un cliente per spiegare le recenti variazioni del suo portafoglio e rassicurarlo sulle prospettive future, mantenendo un tono formale ma empatico.

Response

Gentile Cliente, la contatto per aggiornarla sull'andamento del suo portafoglio nel corso dell'ultimo trimestre. Come probabilmente avrà notato, alcune componenti hanno registrato variazioni legate alla volatilità dei mercati internazionali...

Category: Financial WritingFormat: JSONLDialect: Standard ItalianHuman-written
Prompt

Anda adalah manajer SDM di sebuah perusahaan ritel besar di Jakarta. Tulis memo internal resmi kepada para kepala departemen untuk memberitahu mereka tentang keputusan pembekuan promosi selama enam bulan karena restrukturisasi anggaran.

Response

Kepada Yth. Para Kepala Departemen, Melalui memo ini, kami ingin menyampaikan keputusan manajemen terkait kebijakan promosi karyawan. Berdasarkan arahan dari pimpinan perusahaan dan evaluasi menyeluruh terhadap kondisi anggaran...

Category: Professional WritingFormat: JSONLDialect: Bahasa IndonesiaHuman-written
Prompt

Ikaw ay isang guro sa isang paaralang elementarya sa Maynila. Sumulat ng liham para sa mga magulang ng iyong mga estudyante upang ipaliwanag ang bagong patakaran ng paaralan tungkol sa paggamit ng mga gadget sa loob ng silid-aralan.

Response

Mahal na Mga Magulang, Nais naming ipaalam sa inyo ang bagong patakaran ng aming paaralan kaugnay sa paggamit ng mga electronic na aparato sa loob ng silid-aralan. Ang hakbang na ito ay ginawa upang mapabuti ang kapaligiran ng pag-aaral...

Category: Formal LetterFormat: JSONLDialect: Filipino/TagalogHuman-written
Prompt

Você é gerente de RH em uma empresa de varejo em São Paulo. Escreva um comunicado interno para os chefes de departamento informando sobre o congelamento de promoções por seis meses devido à reestruturação do orçamento.

Response

Prezados Gestores, Por meio deste comunicado, informamos que, em alinhamento com as diretrizes da alta gestão e após análise criteriosa do cenário econômico atual, foi tomada a decisão de suspender temporariamente o processo de promoções...

Category: Business CommunicationFormat: JSONLDialect: Brazilian PortugueseHuman-written

What We Offer
Full-Service Data Production
From raw collection to quality-verified delivery — we handle the entire pipeline. Free pilot batch available on any service.
🧠
SFT Data
Culturally-adapted prompt-response pairs for LLM fine-tuning. Diverse task categories with human writers and 2-layer QA.
⚡ 200 dialogues/day
🎙️
Voice Recording
Native speaker recordings in multiple accents and dialects. .wav/.mp3 with metadata JSON. Multiple environments available.
⚡ 500+ utterances/day
📝
Transcription
Verbatim and clean-read transcription with timestamps and speaker diarization. Delivered as .txt, .srt, or WebVTT.
⚡ 120 min audio/day
🏷️
Data Annotation
Sentiment, NER, intent labeling, bounding boxes, and custom schemas. Delivered as JSON, CSV, or XML.
⚡ 2,000 items/day
🌐
Translation & Localization
Human translation by native speakers. Culturally accurate, not machine post-edited. Covers all language pairs we support.
⚡ 5,000 words/day
🎬
Subtitling & Dubbing
Time-coded subtitles optimized for reading speed. Cultural adaptation for streaming, e-learning, and mobile platforms.
⚡ 60 min video/day
Technical Specs
Capability Breakdown
Every task type, output format, and daily throughput capacity — ready to discuss for your specific volume needs.
Task TypeOutput FormatCapacity
Voice Recording — native & non-native, multiple accents.wav / .mp3 + Metadata JSON500 utterances/day
Transcription — verbatim, clean-read, speaker diarization.txt / .docx / .srt / WebVTT120 min audio/day
Data Annotation — NER, sentiment, intent, bounding boxesYOLO / COCO JSON / CSV / XML2,000 items/day
Translation — human, native speakers, not machine post-edit.docx / .txt / .xliff5,000 words/day
Subtitling — time-coded, reading-speed optimized.srt / .vtt / .sbv60 min video/day
Conversational Data — scripted & open-ended multi-turnJSON / CSV / Custom schema200 dialogues/day
Our Process
Quality Assurance
Four-stage QA ensures every deliverable meets the agreed spec — or we redo it at no additional cost.
✓
Contributor Vetting
All contributors pass language proficiency tests and complete task-specific training before joining active projects.
✓
2-Layer Review
Each deliverable is reviewed by a second contributor, then spot-checked by a project lead before submission.
✓
Format Validation
All outputs are validated against the agreed schema and format before delivery — no raw or unstructured files.
✓
48h Revision Policy
If any deliverable does not meet quality standards, we revise it at no additional cost within 48 hours — guaranteed.
Zero Commitment
Free Pilot Batch Available
50 utterances · 100 annotated items · 10 SFT pairs — test quality before committing to a full project. No contract, no cost.
